title: SIZE GUIDE
unitefitDesc: UNITEFIT is our gender-neutral fit system. It features clothing patterns, created according to different body types, shapes and sizes, instead of gender norms and standards. Your size may be different from the one you usually wear.
relaxedFittedDesc: If you usually shop in men's sizes, select your normal size for a relaxed fit. Size down 1 size for a more fitted fit. If you usually shop in women's sizes, select 1 size down from your usual size for a relaxed fit. Size down 2 sizes for a more fitted fit.
howToMeasureIntro: Follow these easy steps to get the right size for your kid:
howToMeasureTopsIntro: Grab a tape measure, write down the measurements and compare with our size chart for the right size.
step1: Ask your kid to step on a piece of paper with their heel slightly touching a wall behind.
step2: Mark the end of their longest toe on the paper and measure from the wall to the mark.
step3: Do the same for the other foot and compare measurements with our size chart to find the right size.
holdTapeHorizontal: Hold the tape horizontally to measure:
holdTapeVertical: Hold the tape vertically to measure:
topsStep3: Hips, around the widest part, keeping the feet close together
topsStep4: Inseam, from the crotch to the floor
topsStep5: Height, from the top of the head to the floor, keeping a straight posture
sockMeasureAlt: Foot wearing a sock with heel-to-toe measurement guide
sizeProfileDesc: This information will help us recommend the best size for you.
recommendationDesc: Your size recommendation is calculated using the information you've shared and how true to size this item is.
